extension_metadata.description: Extensions added by OntologyProposer from proposals_v047

TimeSteppingMethod.description: A class representing numerical methods that utilize time-stepping techniques, including both explicit and implicit approaches.

FiniteDifferenceMethod.description: A class representing various finite difference techniques used for numerical approximation of derivatives and interpolation.

FourierAnalysisConcept.description: A class representing concepts and methods related to Fourier analysis, including transforms and stability analysis.
